testimonials.testimonial1: Thanks to their excellent service, competitive prices, and customer support. It's truly refreshing to receive such personalized attention.

faq.a1: Booking is simple and fast. Choose your vehicle, select your pick-up and return dates, then confirm your reservation online. Our team will contact you to finalize the details.
faq.a2: We accept bank cards (Visa, Mastercard), bank transfers, and cash payments upon vehicle pick-up.
faq.a3: Yes, you can cancel your reservation up to 24 hours before the pick-up date free of charge. A 50% fee applies for late cancellations.
faq.a4: Our packages include unlimited mileage on most of our vehicles. Some premium models may have a daily limit, please check the conditions when booking.

footer.tagline: Yacout Tours Car Rental Marrakech Airport the car rental agency everywhere in Morocco at the best conditions.

sections.title: Age limit, drivers and documents
sections.content:
The main driver and any additional driver named on the rental agreement are the only people authorized to drive the rental car. They must be over 21 years old and hold a valid driving license issued at least one year ago.

Adding a second driver is free of charge.

To rent a car, you must present a valid driving license and a passport. Photocopies are not accepted.

sections.title: Booking procedure
sections.content:
Booking a rental car with YACOUT TOURS in Marrakech or anywhere in Morocco allows you to rent a car and optional services such as delivery and return at a specified date and location for an agreed rental period.

You may cancel your booking at any time up to 48 hours before the scheduled pick-up date by informing us by email or WhatsApp.

sections.title: Vehicle pick-up and return
sections.content:
YACOUT TOURS will deliver and collect your rental car at the airport, riads, hotels or your residence free of charge in Marrakech and with additional fees in other cities in Morocco.

It is possible to rent a car in one city and return it in another.

sections.title: Vehicle
sections.content:
The rental car is provided in perfect working condition with all equipment and documents required to drive in Morocco. You must return the car in the same condition as it was given to you. Please inspect the rental car and its documents carefully before leaving.

If a vehicle in the selected category is not available, we will try to provide a similar or higher category vehicle at no additional cost.

sections.title: Vehicle use
sections.content:
You must use the rental car in Marrakech and throughout Morocco carefully, legally and for lawful purposes. You must not participate in rallies with the rental car, drive on tracks unless the vehicle is an off-road vehicle, violate Moroccan laws or regulations, leave the vehicle unlocked or unsafe when not in use, or leave windows and sunroofs open. If you notice a fault in the vehicle, stop using it immediately while ensuring your safety and inform us immediately.

Use of the rental car outside Morocco is not permitted.

If you wish to extend the rental, please inform us as soon as possible. Do so before the end date and time of your rental agreement, at least 24 hours in advance, and pay the cost of the additional rental days upon return, as set by YACOUT TOURS.

The renter is responsible for the rented vehicle and its documents during the entire rental period. The renter is responsible for costs caused by loss of documents, accessories or damage to the vehicle noticed in their absence.

sections.title: Unacceptable behavior
sections.content: YACOUT TOURS car rental agency may refuse to rent you a car if you show discourteous or unacceptable behavior, such as driving under the influence of alcohol or drugs, or behaving rudely toward an agency representative.

sections.title: Payment methods
sections.content: We accept Visa and MasterCard credit cards. You can also pay for the car rental in cash or by cheque issued by a Moroccan bank.

sections.title: Prepayments and security deposits
sections.content: When the car is delivered, the rental agency will make a pre-authorization as a security deposit, which also represents the deductible amount. Your payment card issued in your name and with sufficient available funds will be used for this purpose. Exceptionally, YACOUT TOURS may accept the use of a payment card belonging to a family member.

sections.title: Accidents, theft and damage
sections.content:
In the event of an accident or damage to the rental vehicle, even if no third party is involved, you must immediately notify the police and YACOUT TOURS car rental in Marrakech within 48 hours.

If you are responsible for theft or damage to the vehicle, you must pay the deductible amount stated in the rental agreement. Your deductible will not apply if you can prove that the damage, theft or loss was not due to your fault, intentional breach, fraud or gross negligence. You must provide us with a completed accident report form, including details of the other parties involved, within 48 hours of the accident. You will not be held responsible for any loss or damage attributable to our failure to maintain the vehicle.

For minor damage to one of our rental vehicles, we will not charge you. Examples of minor damage include:

- Small dent
- Small scratch
- Seat stains

sections.title: Insurance and deductible
sections.content:
YACOUT TOURS rental cars are fully insured with a deductible amount depending on the vehicle type:

- 500 euros for compact cars
- 1,000 euros for intermediate and family cars
- 2,000 euros for SUVs
- 2,500 euros for 4x4 vehicles

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - YACOUT RENT CAR
privacy.intro: This privacy notice for Yacout Rent Car ('we', 'us' or 'our') describes how and why we may collect, store, use and/or share your information when you use our services, such as when you visit our website at https://yacout-tours.com or any other company website that links to this privacy notice.

sections.title: Summary of key points
sections.content:
This summary provides the key points of our privacy notice.

What personal information do we process? When you visit, use or navigate our services, we may process personal information depending on how you interact with us and the services, the choices you make, and the products and features you use.

Do we process sensitive personal information? We do not process sensitive personal information.

Do we collect information from third parties? We do not collect information from third parties.

How do we process your information? We process your information to provide, improve and administer our services, communicate with you, maintain security, prevent fraud and comply with the law.

How do we keep your information safe? We have implemented organizational and technical processes and procedures to protect your personal information.

What are your rights? Depending on your geographic location, applicable privacy law may give you certain rights regarding your personal information.

sections.title: 1. What information do we collect?
sections.content:
Personal information you disclose to us: we collect the personal information you voluntarily provide when you express interest in obtaining information about us, our products or services, when you participate in activities on the services, or when you contact us.

The personal information we collect may include:
- names
- phone numbers
- email addresses
- billing addresses
- debit/credit card numbers

Sensitive information: we do not process sensitive information.

Payment data: we may collect data necessary to process your payment. All payment data is processed and stored by CMI.

Information collected automatically: some information, such as your IP address and browser/device characteristics, is collected automatically when you visit our services.

sections.title: 2. How do we process your information?
sections.content: We process your information to provide, improve and administer our services, communicate with you, maintain security, prevent fraud and comply with the law. We may also process your information for other purposes with your consent.

sections.title: 3. When and with whom do we share your personal information?
sections.content: We may share information in specific situations described in this section and/or with certain third parties. We may need to share your personal information during business transfers or when we use Google Maps Platform APIs.

sections.title: 4. Do we use cookies and other tracking technologies?
sections.content: We may use cookies and other tracking technologies to collect and store your information. We also allow third parties and service providers to use online tracking technologies on our services for analytics and advertising. We may share your information with Google Analytics to track and analyze the use of the services.

sections.title: 5. How long do we keep your information?
sections.content: We keep your information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this privacy notice, unless the law requires a longer retention period. When we no longer need to process your personal information, we will delete or anonymize it.

sections.title: 6. How do we protect your information?
sections.content: We have implemented appropriate and reasonable technical and organizational security measures designed to protect any personal information we process. However, no electronic transmission over the Internet or information storage technology can be guaranteed to be 100% secure.

sections.title: 7. Do we collect information from minors?
sections.content: We do not knowingly collect or market data from children under 18 years of age. If we learn that personal information from users under 18 has been collected, we will take reasonable measures to delete it promptly.

sections.title: 8. What are your privacy rights?
sections.content: You may review, change or delete your account at any time, depending on your country, province or state of residence. You have the right to withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us. For cookies, most web browsers are set to accept them by default, but you can usually choose to remove or reject them.

sections.title: 9. Controls for Do Not Track features
sections.content: At this stage, no uniform technology standard for recognizing and implementing DNT signals has been finalized. As a result, we do not currently respond to browser DNT signals or any other mechanism that automatically communicates your choice not to be tracked online.

sections.title: 10. Is this notice updated?
sections.content: Yes, we will update this notice as necessary to remain compliant with applicable laws. The updated version will be indicated by an updated date at the top of this privacy notice.

sections.title: 11. How can you contact us about this notice?
sections.content: If you have questions or comments about this notice, you can contact us by mail at: Yacout tours, 100 Rue Mohammed el Beqal, Marrakech 40000, Morocco — yacout.tours@gmail.com

sections.title: 12. How can you review, update or delete the data we collect from you?
sections.content: You may have the right to request access to the personal information we collect from you, details about how we have processed it, correction of inaccuracies, or deletion of your personal information. To request review, update or deletion of your personal information, please contact us at yacout.tours@gmail.com.
